title: rows in sys.statistics are not removed when a temporary table is dropped.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE tbl_temp (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO tbl_temp (id, name) VALUES (1, 'Test Entry');
SELECT * FROM tbl_temp WHERE id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM tbl_temp);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table' AND name='tbl_temp';
key_bug_features: Temporary table drop does not clear sys.statistics entries.
